metadata.formDescription: Apply for comprehensive life insurance cover with optional riders and beneficiary nominations.

fullName.label: Full Name (as per NIC / Passport)
fullName.description: Please enter your full legal name including all middle names.

accountPassword.label: Account Password
accountPassword.description: Optional: Create password for account access

dob.label: Date of Birth
dob.description: You must be between 18 and 65 years of age to apply.

appointmentTime.label: Preferred Appointment Time
appointmentTime.description: Select your preferred time for medical examination

policyStartDateTime.label: Desired Policy Start Date & Time
policyStartDateTime.description: When would you like the policy to commence?

medicalConditions.label: Medical Conditions (Select all that apply)
medicalConditions.description: Please select any medical conditions you have been diagnosed with.

nationalId.label: National ID / Passport No.
nationalId.description: Enter your valid NIC or passport number.

mobile.label: Mobile Number
mobile.description: We will use this for OTP and policy communication.

email.label: Email Address
email.description: Policy documents and notifications may be sent to this email.

website.label: Personal Website (Optional)
website.description: If you have a personal or professional website

annualIncome.label: Annual Income (LKR)
annualIncome.description: Used only for risk assessment and underwriting.

smokerStatus.label: Do you smoke or use tobacco products?

sumAssured.label: Requested Sum Assured (LKR)
sumAssured.description: Total life cover amount you are applying for.

policyTermYears.label: Policy Term (Years)
policyTermYears.description: Number of years you want the cover to run.

addCriticalIllnessRider.label: Add Critical Illness Rider
addCriticalIllnessRider.description: Provides additional payout on diagnosis of covered critical illnesses.

addAccidentalDeathRider.label: Add Accidental Death Benefit Rider
addAccidentalDeathRider.description: Additional benefit in the event of death due to accident.

hasExistingPolicies.label: Do you have existing life insurance policies?

existingPolicyDetails.label: Existing Policy Details
existingPolicyDetails.placeholder: Company, policy number, sum assured, commencement date, etc.
existingPolicyDetails.description: Provide details of all existing life insurance policies.

idDocument.label: Upload ID Document
idDocument.description: Upload a clear scan/photo of your NIC or passport (PDF/JPG/PNG).

declarationAgreement.label: I declare that the information provided is true and complete.
declarationAgreement.description: You must agree before submitting the proposal.

layout.text: **Important**: Please complete all required fields marked with *. Inaccurate information may affect your cover and claim eligibility.

items.text: This form will take approximately 15-20 minutes to complete. Please have your **NIC/Passport** and **income details** ready.
Create an account to track your application status and manage your policy online.

si.formDescription: විකල්ප අතිරේක ප්‍රතිලාභ සහ වාරසාධිකයින් නම් කිරීම සමඟ සම්පූර්ණ ජීවිත රක්ෂණ ආවරණයක් සඳහා අයදුම් කරන්න.
si.text.completion_notice: **වැදගත්**: කරුණාකර * සලකුණු කර ඇති සියලුම අවශ්‍ය ක්ෂේත්‍ර පුරවන්න. නිවැරදි නොවන තොරතුරු ඔබගේ ආවරණය සහ හිමිකම් සුදුසුකම්වලට බලපෑම් කළ හැකිය.
si.text.overview_info: මෙම පෝරමය සම්පූර්ණ කිරීමට ආසන්න වශයෙන් මිනිත්තු 15-20 ක් ගත වනු ඇත. කරුණාකර ඔබගේ **ජා.හැ./පාස්පෝට්** සහ **ආදායම් විස්තර** සූදානම් කරන්න.
si.text.account_info: ඔබගේ අයදුම්කරණ තත්ත්වය නිරීක්ෂණය කිරීමට සහ ඔබගේ පොලිසිය මාර්ගගතව කළමනාකරණය කිරීමට ගිණුමක් සාදන්න.
si.medicalConditions.label: සෞඛ්‍ය තත්ත්වයන් (දැනටමත් ඇති සියල්ල තෝරන්න)
si.medicalConditions.description: කරුණාකර ඔබට හඳුනාගෙන ඇති ඕනෑම සෞඛ්‍ය තත්ත්වයක් තෝරන්න.

ta.formDescription: கூடுதல் ரைடர்களும் பயனாளி நியமனங்களும் உடன் முழுமையான வாழ்க்கை காப்பீட்டு பாதுகாப்புக்கு விண்ணப்பிக்கவும்.
ta.text.completion_notice: **முக்கியம்**: தயவுசெய்து * குறிக்கப்பட்ட அனைத்து தேவையான புலங்களையும் நிரப்பவும். துல்லியமற்ற தகவல்கள் உங்கள் பாதுகாப்பு மற்றும் கோரிக்கை தகுதியை பாதிக்கலாம்.
ta.text.overview_info: இந்த படிவத்தை நிரப்ப சுமார் 15-20 நிமிடங்கள் ஆகும். தயவுசெய்து உங்கள் **தே.அ/பாஸ்போர்ட்** மற்றும் **வருமான விவரங்கள்** தயாராக வைக்கவும்.
ta.text.account_info: உங்கள் விண்ணப்ப நிலையைக் கண்காணிக்கவும் உங்கள் காப்பீட்டை ஆன்லைனில் நிர்வகிக்கவும் ஒரு கணக்கை உருவாக்கவும்.
ta.medicalConditions.label: மருத்துவ நிலைமைகள் (இருப்பவை அனைத்தையும் தேர்ந்தெடுக்கவும்)
ta.medicalConditions.description: தயவுசெய்து உங்களுக்கு கண்டறியப்பட்ட எந்த மருத்துவ நிலைமைகளையும் தேர்ந்தெடுக்கவும்.
